testcase.name: test_scan_returns_scan_object
testcase.failure: tests/test_anomaly_detection_iter54.py:58: in test_scan_returns_scan_object assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_scan_with_different_days

failure.message: AssertionError: Scan failed for days=30 assert 401 == 200 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_anomaly_detection_iter54.py:120: in test_scan_with_different_days assert response.status_code == 200, f"Scan failed for days={days}" E AssertionError: Scan failed for days=30 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
